hero.text: The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
hero.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

aries.general: Today you will find your passion reignited, encouraging you to take bold steps in your life.
aries.love: It's a wonderful time for deepening relationships. Be open and share your feelings honestly.
aries.career: Opportunities will arise; be ready to seize them and showcase your abilities.

taurus.general: Patience will be key today; take things slow and steady.
taurus.love: An unexpected encounter could bring romance your way—stay alert!
taurus.career: Bureaucracy might slow down your projects, but perseverance will pay off.

gemini.general: Communication is highlighted today; engage with others and express your thoughts.
gemini.love: Good conversations can deepen your bonds. Share your dreams with your partner.
gemini.career: Networking could lead to new opportunities; don't hesitate to reach out.

cancer.general: Your intuition will guide you to make the right decisions today.
cancer.love: Emotional connections are important today; nurture those relationships.
cancer.career: A creative idea may surface—consider it seriously and explore its potential.

leo.general: Confidence is your ally today; step into the spotlight and be noticed.
leo.love: Passion is in the air; let your heart lead your expressions.
leo.career: Showcase your talents and you may receive recognition at work.

virgo.general: Focus on the details today and you will achieve great results.
virgo.love: Thoughtful gestures will strengthen your relationships—be mindful of others' needs.
virgo.career: Organize your tasks and prioritize; your efficiency will shine through.

libra.general: Balance will be important today; find harmony in your personal and professional life.
libra.love: Sharing your thoughts will enhance your relationship; honesty is key.
libra.career: Collaboration is favored; work with others to achieve your goals.

scorpio.general: Transformation is possible; embrace change and rebuild aspects of your life.
scorpio.love: Deep conversations could strengthen your bond with your partner.
scorpio.career: You might face challenges, but your determination will see you through.

sagittarius.general: Adventure awaits; seek new experiences and broaden your horizons today.
sagittarius.love: Spontaneity can be exciting; surprise your partner with something new.
sagittarius.career: Your adventurous nature may lead to new projects or assignments.

capricorn.general: Dedication and hard work will be recognized today; keep pushing forward.
capricorn.love: Your partner may need support; be there for them when it counts.
capricorn.career: Focus on long-term goals; small steps will lead to great achievements.

aquarius.general: Innovation is in the air; don't shy away from thinking outside the box.
aquarius.love: Open-mindedness in conversations with your partner can spark new intimacy.
aquarius.career: Your creative solutions will be appreciated at work, leading to advancement.

pisces.general: Emotional connections deepen; let your sensitivity be your strength today.
pisces.love: Romance is heightened, and your intuition will guide you in love matters.
pisces.career: Your empathetic nature could lead to team support; be the morale booster.

professional.text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
professional.author: Henry David Thoreau

professional.text: Opportunities don't happen, you create them.
professional.author: Chris Grosser

professional.text: Work hard in silence, let your success be your noise.
professional.author: Frank Ocean

professional.text: Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
professional.author: Sam Levenson

professional.text: The only limit to our realization of tomorrow will be our doubts of today.
professional.author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

professional.text: The future depends on what you do today.
professional.author: Mahatma Gandhi

motivation.text: Push yourself, because no one else is going to do it for you.
motivation.author: Unknown

motivation.text: Great things never come from comfort zones.
motivation.author: Unknown

motivation.text: Dream it. Wish it. Do it.
motivation.author: Unknown

motivation.text: Success doesn’t just find you. You have to go out and get it.
motivation.author: Unknown

motivation.text: The harder you work for something, the greater you’ll feel when you achieve it.
motivation.author: Unknown

captions.text: Chasing dreams one day at a time.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Embrace the glorious mess that you are.
captions.author: Elizabeth Gilbert

captions.text: Be yourself; everyone else is already taken.
captions.author: Oscar Wilde

captions.text: Life is short. Make every selfie fabulous!
captions.author: Unknown

tech.text: Technology is best when it brings people together.
tech.author: Matt Mullenweg

tech.text: The science of today is the technology of tomorrow.
tech.author: Edward Teller

tech.text: Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.
tech.author: Steve Jobs

tech.text: The greatest danger in times of turbulence is not the turbulence—it is to act with yesterday’s logic.
tech.author: Peter Drucker

tech.text: Technology is transforming the world; embrace it.
tech.author: Unknown

tech.text: It has become appallingly obvious that our technology has exceeded our humanity.
tech.author: Albert Einstein

fun.text: Why don't scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: I told my computer I needed a break, and now it won't stop sending me KitKat ads!
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: I'm on a whiskey diet; I've lost three days already!
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: Parallel lines have so much in common. It’s a shame they’ll never meet.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: I told my wife she was drawing her eyebrows too high. She looked surprised.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: Why don’t skeletons fight each other? They don’t have the guts!
fun.author: Unknown

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don’t see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: Faith sees the invisible, believes the unbelievable, and receives the impossible.
faith.author: Corrie Ten Boom

faith.text: The greatest test of faith is when you don’t get what you want but still, you are grateful.
faith.author: Unknown

faith.text: Let your faith be bigger than your fear.
faith.author: Unknown

faith.text: Where there is faith, there is hope.
faith.author: Unknown

wisdom.text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: Wisdom is the reward you get for a lifetime of listening when you'd have preferred to talk.
wisdom.author: Mark Twain

wisdom.text: In seeking wisdom, you will learn more by listening than by speaking.
wisdom.author: Unknown

wisdom.text: To know what you know and what you do not know, that is true knowledge.
wisdom.author: Confucius

wisdom.text: Wisdom is not a product of schooling but of the lifelong attempt to acquire it.
wisdom.author: Albert Einstein
